description: MCPTotal is part of Autonomous Security's platform for securing and governing AI agents, MCP servers, and related enterprise AI activity. Its site describes controls for discovery, enforcement, and secure hosted MCP operations.
summary: MCPTotal exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcptotal.io/mcp`, with self-serve OAuth 2.0 client registration and authorization-code-plus-PKCE authentication.
